subcodes.first_line: O ye two loving brothers! In the celestial sphere, the sign of Gemini is called "Two Figures" in Persian, which resembleth two humans [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو برادر مهرپرور شکل جوزا را در فلک بپارسی دو پیکر گویند که مانند دو انسان
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
